title: Day 18 Restricted Nomination and CP2 Pre-Authorization Gate

items.title: Current-main and numbering audit
items.finding: Day18 is based on 394f494f and starts at GOV-0103, ADR-0027, REF-0035, and GOV-TPL-0029.

items.title: Day17 execution evidence
items.finding: PR #7 is merged and Day17 feature validations succeeded.

items.title: Restricted workspace boundary
items.finding: Private paths and public-manifest boundaries are defined.

items.title: Git-ignore protection
items.finding: The application script requires .ming-private and restricted-accountability paths to be ignored.

items.title: CP2 nomination slots
items.finding: Four slots and a three-distinct-person minimum are defined.

items.title: Separation-of-duties mapping
items.finding: Conditional combinations and absolute separation rules remain binding.

items.title: Restricted nomination workflow
items.finding: Nomination, acceptance, verification, scope, expiry, and replacement records are defined.

items.title: CP2 protocol applicability
items.finding: Six required or adapted approvals and one not-applicable protocol are identified.

items.title: CP2 environment minimum set
items.finding: Eight minimum controls and prohibited data classes are defined.

items.title: Conditional pre-authorization decision
items.finding: Preparation is conditionally approved while actual CP2 authorization remains blocked.

items.title: Synthetic pre-authorization tabletop
items.finding: Twelve synthetic scenarios pass with no real evidence.

items.title: Role acceptance and checks
items.finding: No acceptance, qualification, conflict, or independence check is complete.

items.title: Three-person topology staffed
items.finding: Slots A, B, and C are not staffed.

items.title: CP2 protocol sign-offs
items.finding: No CP2 human-use protocol approval is complete.

items.title: CP2 environment deployment
items.finding: No control is deployed or verified.
